MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-12-2024 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. RAYMOND GHERMEZIAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. KATHERINE BERMAN, ESQ. AND MARK LIPTON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/8/24 IS CONTINUED TO 9/23/24 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL AND DISCOVERY DEADLINES TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THERE WILL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE ABSENT GOOD CAUSE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R.
